title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards: Full List of Winners - Best Motion Picture Animated
text: KPop Demon Hunters claimed the Best Motion Picture - Animated award at the 83rd annual Golden Globe Awards held on January 11, 2026. The film competed against five other animated features: Arco, Demon Slayer, Elio, Little Amélie or the Character of Rain, and Zootopia 2. The Golden Globes recognized the film as the standout animated feature of the year, continuing the trend of selecting commercially successful and critically acclaimed animated works.
